description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service. Define a single stage called build and a job named job1 that runs in this stage on runners tagged docker. In job1 execute the following script commands in order: docker build -f ./Dockerfile.go -t taisun/dev_cloud9:Go ., docker build -f ./Dockerfile.node -t taisun/dev_cloud9:Node.js ., docker build -f ./Dockerfile.python -t taisun/dev_cloud9:Python ., docker build -f ./Dockerfile.ruby -t taisun/dev_cloud9:Ruby ., echo $DOCKERPASS | docker login -u taisun --password-stdin, docker push taisun/dev_cloud9:Go, docker push taisun/dev_cloud9:Node.js, docker push taisun/dev_cloud9:Python, docker push taisun/dev_cloud9:Ruby. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
